name: DoIP_GetVehicleDiscoveryTimeout, DoIP_SetVehicleDiscoveryTimeout
title: DoIP_GetVehicleDiscoveryTimeout, DoIP_SetVehicleDiscoveryTimeout
description: Sets or returns the timeout waiting for Vehicle Identification Response Messages after a Vehicle Identification Request was sent (in milliseconds).
return: Form 1: —Form 2: Timeout waiting for Vehicle Identification Response Messages

description: This value can also be configured in the DoIP.INI file.
example.code:
// Wait longer than the standard suggests to detect more vehicles
DoIP_SetVehicleDiscoveryTimeout( 10000);
